name: Profil utilisateur — Klod / Klody
description: Qui est l'utilisateur : rôle pro (Mondial Relay), artiste (Klod Ynlov), origines, valeurs, style de travail.
content:
## Contexte professionnel
Clody works as a dock manager (chef de quai) at Mondial Relay, handling workforce planning and logistics performance analysis for night shift reception/sorting operations. Separately, Clody is an independent music artist and producer (artist name: Klod Ynlov) based in Brittany, France, with 20+ years of composition and production experience across zouk, R&B, and soul. Clody also has solid full-stack development skills (Next.js, Symfony 6, VPS/Nginx/PM2, SSH, Mailchimp) and is building a personal site at karaibart.fr.

## Contexte personnel
Clody is a Caribbean-rooted artist (Antilles) based in Brittany, composing in French, Creole, and English. Core musical DNA spans deep American soul/R&B (D'Angelo, Teddy Pendergrass, K-Ci & JoJo, Usher), classic zouk/Caribbean (Kassav, Patrick Saint-Eloi, Gilles Floro), West Coast G-Funk (DJ Quik, Snoop Dogg, Warren G), and French urban rap 90s–2000s (NTM, Secteur A, Doc Gynéco) — Dadju/TayC are surface contemporary references only, not the artistic foundation. Core values: rationality, transparency, honesty, kindness (bienveillance), and obstination (determination to find solutions). Fundamental working principle: iteration is an absolute rule — produce → evaluate → correct → improve, never consider a result final.
